mission.title: cadence-workflow: cadence-workflow 0.20.0 build issue on apple arm64
mission.description: cadence-workflow 0.20.0 build issue on apple arm64. Community-reported issue.

steps.title: Identify cadence-workflow troubleshoot symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your cadence-workflow deployment:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n cadence-workflow -l app.kubernetes.io/name=cadence-workflow
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=cadence-workflow -n cadence-workflow --tail=100 | grep -i error
```
Look for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue.

steps.title: Review cadence-workflow configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant cadence-workflow configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n cadence-workflow -l app.kubernetes.io/name=cadence-workflow
kubectl get configmap -n cadence-workflow -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=cadence-workflow
```
👋 trying to build the latest release, but run into some build issue.

steps.title: Apply the fix for cadence-workflow 0.20.0 build issue on apple arm64
steps.description:
great, at least the cause is pretty clear this time:
```
downloading protoc 3.14.0: https://github.com/protocolbuffers/protobuf/releases/download/v3.14.0/protoc-3.14.0-osx-arm64.zip
```
^ that url is a 404, so it's probably just an unvalid zip file.  Looks like there are just no arm64 downloads at
```yaml
(cadence-0.20)$ brew install --build-from-source cadence-workflow
==> Downloading https://ghcr.io/v2/homebrew/core/go/manifests/1.16.3
Already downloaded: /Users/qlong/Library/Caches/Homebrew/downloads/a0c7d5540c8c88f612cedc7d9af128deb15aa152ce0b0f2e1bcd3d8f235020f5--go-1.16.3.bottle_manifest.json
==> Downloading https://ghcr.io/v2/homebrew/core/go/blobs/sha256:69c28f5e60612801c66e51e93d32068f822b245ab83246cb6cb374572eb59e15
Already downloaded: /Users/qlong/Library/Caches/Homebrew/downloads/d74822e0d6c473f04ff2856cab284c0f3a55bc4edbd09f63f4c542a528d0495e--go--1.16.3.catalina.bottle.tar.gz
==> 
```

steps.title: Confirm cadence-workflow 0.20.0 build issue on apple arm64 is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
```bash
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=cadence-workflow -n cadence-workflow --tail=50 --since=5m
kubectl get events -n cadence-workflow --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm that the issue symptoms are gone.

resolution.summary:
great, at least the cause is pretty clear this time:
```
downloading protoc 3.14.0: https://github.com/protocolbuffers/protobuf/releases/download/v3.14.0/protoc-3.14.0-osx-arm64.zip
```
^ that url is a 404, so it's probably just an unvalid zip file.  Looks like there are just no arm64 downloads at all on any release, so we might want to special-case those and download the x86_64 one instead.

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with cadence-workflow installed or the issue environment reproducible.
